from source import quicksort

def test_quicksort_preserves_duplicates():
    arr = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    result = quicksort(arr)
    assert result == sorted(arr), (
        f"quicksort({arr}) returned {result}, expected {sorted(arr)}; "
        "duplicate values must not be dropped"
    )
